---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Report a bug to help us improve the RaktaSetu NOOR platform
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

### 🚨 Describe the Bug
Provide a clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### 👣 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

### 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### 📸 Screenshots & Logs
If applicable, add screenshots, terminal command outputs, or JSON logs to help explain your problem.

### 💻 Environment Configuration
- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS Sequoia)
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome, Safari)
- **Python Version:** (e.g. 3.11.4)
- **Node Version:** (e.g. 20.9.0)

### ❓ Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. whether it was a local CWD mismatch, SQLite vs PostgreSQL issue).
